pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.8 to 3.2.5 to align with Java 17 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 is possible but prevents using modern Spring features and may cause compatibility issues with other upgraded dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java compiler source and target properties from 8 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; compiling with source/target 8 on a Java 17 JDK or vice-versa without proper configuration leads to compilation errors or missing language features.
